title: Did iShowSpeed really get Guadeloupe citizenship during his viral Caribbean tour moment?
summary_full: Darren “iShowSpeed” Watkins Jr. did not receive Guadeloupean citizenship despite viral claims online. A video showing a symbolic moment confused viewers, but Guadeloupe cannot legally grant citizenship as it is part of France. There was no official confirmation. Fans compared it to his Ghana passport moment, but this claim has no legal truth behind it.
